# MPTC Lexicon - For LLM Consumption
- Site: https://mptclexicon.vercel.app/
- Data Source: https://mptclexicon.vercel.app/mptc_lexicon.json
- API: https://mptclexicon.vercel.app/api/lexicon

## Description
Official Khmer Digital Terminology Lexicon from Ministry of Posts and Telecommunications of Cambodia (MPTC). Contains 454+ terms in Khmer, English, and French with definitions.

## API
Programmatic access for AI agents and tools:
- Full dataset: https://mptclexicon.vercel.app/api/lexicon
- Search: https://mptclexicon.vercel.app/api/terms?q=<query>
  - Optional params: part=p1|p2, letter=<khmer letter>, limit, offset, id=<term id>
  - Example: /api/terms?q=cloud&part=p1
  - Example: /api/terms?id=4

## Data Format
- JSON schema: { meta: { title, version, source, url, generated, total, p1_count, p2_count }, p1: [...], p2: [...] }
- Each term includes: id, letter, khmer_term, english_term, (french_term, definition_km for p1)

## Languages
- Khmer (km)
- English (en)
- French (fr)
